data.name: Erotic Dream Puzzle
data.detailed_description:
Erotic Dream Puzzle is a casual swap-puzzle game with relaxing music and gameplay.

FEATURES
❀ Beautiful artwork
❀ 24 hand drawn girls
❀ Relaxing music
❀ Puzzle game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: Intel i3 2470
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD
  • 儲存空間: 350 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: Intel i3 2470
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD
